capabilities.title: Bounded unsigned component model
evidence: src/tests.zig: variable-BPC and sampled planar matrices
capabilities.note: Public coverage remains 1..4 unsigned 8/16-bit components; broader Part 1 integer layouts remain fail-closed.

capabilities.title: Native signed integer component model
evidence: Kakadu signed 8-bit single-, five-, and nineteen-component multi-tile fixtures plus signed mixed 5/12/19-bit, 7/13/23-bit sampled, 8/16/20-bit, and 29-bit PGX/codestream fixtures
native carrier signed-range, caller-limit, and legacy fail-closed tests
capabilities.note: The native i64 API decodes caller-limited single- and multi-tile reversible no-MCT signed 1..29-bit payloads through the 256-component metadata bound, including mixed component precision and independent sampling, at full and lower resolutions; independent interop is pinned at 5/7/8/12/13/16/19/20/23/29 bits and 19 components.

capabilities.title: Component-local sampling and origins
capabilities.note: Reversible 5/3 no-MCT sampled layouts are public within the documented 1..4-component envelope.

capabilities.title: COD/QCD plus COC/QCC overrides
evidence: Kakadu divergent scalar-expounded ICT/9-7 QCC fixture
Kakadu reversible component-local COC levels/precinct fixture
Kakadu multi-tile COD/QCD override fixture and malformed counterparts
capabilities.note: Uniform or byte-redundant overrides, component-specific scalar-expounded QCC in the bounded three-component ICT/9-7 profile, single-tile no-MCT reversible component-local decomposition/precinct/block/style, and first-tile-part reversible no-MCT tile-local COD/QCD are accepted; component-local transforms and broader tile-header combinations remain fail-closed.

capabilities.title: Progression orders and POC schedules
capabilities.note: Complete bounded schedules are supported; sampled PPM+POC and broader combinations remain closed.

capabilities.title: Inline, PLT/PLM, PPT and PPM packet metadata
evidence: PLT and PLT-less packet catalog tests
capabilities.note: PLT, inline, PPT and PPM are covered in bounded layouts; PLM is not implemented.

capabilities.title: Tiles and tile-part schedules
capabilities.note: Many practical schedules are covered; general PLT-less non-empty multipart streams remain open.

capabilities.title: Tier-1 code-block styles
capabilities.note: The public style matrix is broad but still tied to the bounded sample/coding-style model.

capabilities.title: Reversible 5/3 transform
capabilities.note: Pixel-exact within all currently public component and packet profiles.

capabilities.title: Irreversible 9/7 and scalar quantization
capabilities.note: Broad practical coverage exists, but not arbitrary component-local quantization/coding-style combinations.

capabilities.title: RGN Maxshift ROI
capabilities.note: Planned after the generic component/coding-style foundation.

capabilities.title: CRG component registration
capabilities.note: Current sampled placement uses SIZ origins and sampling only.

capabilities.title: PLM and CAP/PRF signalling
capabilities.note: Profile signalling and main-header packet length support remain explicit future work.

capabilities.title: JP2 core container and channel mappings
capabilities.note: Core JP2 plus bounded palette, alpha, colour and metadata mappings are public; JPX is excluded.

capabilities.title: Layer/resolution/tile/region selective streaming decode
capabilities.note: Bounded resolution reduction skips discarded T1 blocks and performs partial 5/3 or 9/7 synthesis; layer, tile, region, and incremental input selection remain open.

source.command: kdu_compress -i src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-source-c0.pgm,src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-source-c1.pgm,src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-source-c2.pgm -o src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-multitile.j2c Ssampling={1,1},{2,2},{2,2} Creversible=no Cycc=no Stiles={17,17} Clevels=1 Corder=RPCL Cprecincts={8,8} Cblk={4,4} Clayers=1 ORGgen_plt=yes -rate - -num_threads 0; kdu_expand -i src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-multitile.j2c -o src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-multitile-full-c0.pgx,src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-multitile-full-c1.pgx,src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-multitile-full-c2.pgx -num_threads 0; kdu_expand -i src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-multitile.j2c -o src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-multitile-r1-c0.pgx,src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-multitile-r1-c1.pgx,src/testdata/kakadu-sampled-97-multitile-r1-c2.pgx -reduce 1 -num_threads 0
